About

Writing that closes the gap between AI and the people using it

Most AI products are built on genuinely impressive technology. The communication around them rarely keeps up. Teams describe features in language that confuses users and leaves the people it was built for feeling uncertain rather than confident.

That gap is where I work. I write long-form content, product explainers, and communication frameworks that help AI startups say something true about what they have built — in language that earns trust rather than just attention.

My work is grounded in a ten-part series on responsible AI communication, published on Medium and AI Plain English.

Services

What I do for AI startups

01
AI Product Explainers

Long-form articles that explain what your AI product does in plain language — for users who need to understand it, not engineers who built it.

02
Responsible AI Communication

Content that helps your team talk about AI honestly. No overpromising. Language that builds trust before users find the limitations themselves.

03
Startup Product Writing

Content that introduces your AI startup to its audience clearly — explaining what you do, who it is for, and why it matters in language that earns attention.
